pwaUi.installNote: Установите Auralith Maps как отдельное приложение.

manifest.data:
{
    "name": "Auralith Maps",
    "short_name": "Auralith Maps",
    "description": "Навигатор и карта парковок Auralith Maps.",
    "start_url": "/",
    "scope": "/",
    "display": "standalone",
    "background_color": "#061018",
    "theme_color": "#061018",
    "orientation": "portrait",
    "icons": [
        {
            "src": "/images/ChatGPT%20Image%20Jun%201%2C%202026%2C%2002_33_28%20PM.png?v=20260604",

        },
        {
            "src": "/images/ChatGPT%20Image%20Jun%201%2C%202026%2C%2002_33_28%20PM.png?v=20260604",

}
